title: Tripura University Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate I Posts
description: The Tripura University has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Associate I Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M. Pharm can apply for the Tripura University Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, application fee, salary, and how ...
